# Quick Start

Get AI Dispatcher up and running with your field service management system.

## Step 1: Create Your Account

Sign up at the AI Dispatcher dashboard and create your workspace.

## Step 2: Connect Your FSM

Navigate to **Settings > Connected Apps** and connect your field service management platform:
- FieldCamp
- Jobber
- HouseCallPro
- ServiceTrade

## Step 3: Set Up Your Team

Add your technicians with their skills, service areas, and availability schedules.

## Step 4: Start Dispatching

Go to the **AI Dispatch** page and let the AI recommend optimal job assignments. Review and approve with one click.
